title: The One With The Ride Along

lines.text: Central Perk, Chandler, Rachel, Joey, and Monica are sitting on the couch as Ross is up getting some coffee.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, guys, listen, don't forget that tomorrow is the day that Emily gets married again, so whatever we do, just try to really keep Ross's mind off of it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, yeah, good idea.
Ross returns.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey man, what's up?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (sits down at the table) Oh, eh, just thinking about Emily getting married tomorrow. (Joey panics.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ooh, Ross, look! Look! (Points behind Ross.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (turning and looking) What? Where?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Right over there! Right there! Look-look-look!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What am I looking at?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to the rest of the gang) Somebody help me out here!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (entering, with Gary) Hey!

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: How are you?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Monica, I'm sorry I didn't come by last night. I was out with Gary; he let me ride around with him in his cop car. We saw and prevented crimes.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You got to go on a ride along?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh-huh!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I want to go on a ride along!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Me too!

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Okay!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, yeah! Me too!

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Really?! You?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Well, it's kinda dangerous.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, I like danger.

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Okay, you guys free tonight?

lines.speaker: Joey and Ross
lines.text: Yeah!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Tonight? You-you didn't say it was going to be at nighttime.
Opening Credits
Monica and Rachel's, Monica is kneeling at the coffee table and has a bunch of pictures laid out in front of her as Rachel enters.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey! Oh, I'm so glad you're home, I thought tonight we could finally organize these photos!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, thank God! Finally!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, I've broken them down into categories. Okay, we have uh, we got holidays, birthdays, candids, y'know... And then what I've done is I've cross-referenced them by subject. Right? So if you're looking up, oh let's say birthdays and dogs, you get Photo 152. See? (Hands her the photo.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, it's me and La Poo! Wow! I miss that dog.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You can also find him under umm, dog and dead.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Great! Thanks!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right, hand me that other box of photos; that's the very last one.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.
She picks up the box and the bottom falls out, spilling all of the pictures onto Monica's neat little piles.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oops. Sorry! Well, good thing you number all of them, huh?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I hadn't! Photo 152 was a prototype.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohhhh. Honey, honey, honey, it's okay, it's okay honey. I'm gonna fix you a drink, huh? Maybe a margarita?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Ross has the blender! Ugh, everything's just falling apart!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No honey, it's okay! Listen, I'll got to Ross's and get the blender, you get all the margarita stuff ready.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right, he's keys are in the drawer. Y'know what? I also need some cash.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, you want me to stop at the ATM?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Nah, while you're at Ross's if you see any lying around...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?! I-I-I don't, I don't do that!
Rachel slowly leaves the apartment.
Gary's cop car, Ross is in the front seat with Gary of course. Chandler is in the back seat.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (to Gary) That was so cool man, the way you leaned on that guy.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It is starting to get dark out there.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (to Gary) He told you everything! I mean you totally cracked him!

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Yeah well, being that he was the victim, they're usually pretty talkative.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (laughing) Okay. (Deadpan) But it is officially nighttime.
Gary reaches up to grab that little light that cops have for unmarked cop cars.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh hey, Gary, want me to grab the berry for ya?

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: It's called the cherry.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's the-Chandler!!
Chandler starts laughing at his joke.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (returning from a deli) Okay, I got it! This place makes the best sandwich in the world!

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Hey Joe does it have meatballs on it?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh-ho, yeah!

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Does it have melted cheese and marinara sauce?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yep!

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Yeah, you can't eat that in my car.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (dejected) Yeah okay. (To Chandler) Even though my tax dollars paid for this car.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Your tax dollars?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, okay.
[Time lapse, they're still on the ride along and Joey is just sniffing his sandwich.]

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (leans in and takes a sniff of Joey's sandwich) Wow! That sandwich really does smell good.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Did I say you could smell it?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I can't smell your sandwich?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Half the taste is in the smell! You-you're sucking up all the tastiness!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, I'll give them back. (Exhales strongly through his nose and Joey just glares at him.) Look! What is so great about that sandwich?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, imagine the best sex you've ever had.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Are you thinking about Monica?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, what's that like?
Ross's apartment, Rachel is just entering. She takes off her coat and heads for the kitchen. As she does, she knocks something off of a bookcase next to the kitchen door with her coat and it breaks.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh please don't be from a real dinosaur! Please! Please! Please! Please! Please! Please! Please! Please! (She picks up the 2 pieces and looks at the stand.) Made in Mexico! Yes!! Ugh, who would buy this?! (Looks for a place to hide it and finds a wall sconce and drops the pieces into it and heads into the kitchen as the phone rings.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (on the answering machine) Rach! It's me! Pick up!
Rachel runs over and answers the phone with the blender in hand.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey! What's up?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I need a few more things to make the margaritas. Uhh, I need some salt, some margarita mix, and tequila.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So all we have is ice?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: See if he has ice.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

She hangs up the phone and starts to head back to the kitchen and notices some money lying out, stops, reaches down to pick it up, the phone rings causing her to drop it, she quickly puts it back, and heads for the kitchen.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: (on answering machine) Hello Ross? It's Emily. (Rachel runs back into the room with the tequila.) I know this is out of the blue but uh, I'm getting married tomorrow. Well, maybe I am. I keep thinking about you and I'm wondering if-if we made a mistake giving up so fast. Are you thinking about me? Of course you're not, but if you are, call me tonight. Okay, bye.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh. Oh! (Takes a slug of tequila.)
The ride along.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So where are we going next?

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: This witness won't return my calls so we're gonna see if we can surprise him coming home.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Sur-surprise him? We're not, we're not gonna make anybody mad are we?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Come on man! (To Gary) Listen so uh, are you gonna squeeze the perps shoes a little bit before he lawyers up?

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: It's a witness not a perp. And no one talks like that!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, no one talks like that!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh what? Like your Mr. Cop!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, I'm more cop than you two!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: How do you figure that?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hello! I'm in the front seat, okay? I'm Gary's partner!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know, when you say partner it doesn't sound cop. It, it sounds gay.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Umm, jealous! (He drops the cherry and it turns on.)

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Hey, do you mind? We're under cover here.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, no problem. (Tries to turn it off.)

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Ross!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Sorry! Sorry! Oh, (He sticks it under his shirt) there! (It's just there flashing through his shirt) Hey Gary, who am I? Phone home!
Gary just glares at him.
[Time lapse, Ross has been demoted to the back seat with Joey and Chandler. He's not too happy about it.]

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look at Officer Ross riding back here with the visitors.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, what's up with that Serpico?
Ross's apartment, Rachel is playing Emily's message to Monica.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: (on answering machine) Are you thinking about me? Of course you're not, but if you are, call me tonight. Okay, bye.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (does Rachel's) Nooo!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (does Monica's) I know!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well thank God you were here! I mean, we have to erase that!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?! We can't do that!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: We have too! I mean what if Ross's hears that and then calls her back and then they get back together? Is that what you want? Ross back with that controlling, neurotic, crazy Emily? The Emily that wouldn't let him see you?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Noo! Oh no! No! God no! He should not get back together with her. I know that! You know that! Even Ross knows that! But that still doesn't give us the right to erase his message!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm his sister, okay? I love him! I don't want to see him get hurt! Come on! Doesn't that give me the right to control him-help him?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't think he's the one who needs help.
They both sit down.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, look, she's obviously unstable, okay? I mean she's thinking about running out on her wedding day. (Rachel slowly turns and glares at her.) (Realizing what she just said.) Okay, fine! But I mean, look at the position she's putting him in! What's he gonna do? Ross is gonna run over there on the wedding day and break up the marriage?! I mean, who would do that?! (Rachel again turns and glares at her in disgust.) Okay, fine, all right, but that's y'know, it's different! Although it did involve a lot of the same people.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ugh!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Y'know what, this is obviously some kind of twisted joke she's trying to play on him.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, you are crazy! I'm sorry, but she sounded generally upset! I mean, listen! (She hits a button on the machine.)

lines.speaker: Answering Machine
lines.text: Your messages have been erased.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Noooooooo!
The ride along, they're all waiting outside of the witness's house and still in the car in the same places as before.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, y'know, we-we're safe right? I mean nothing bad can go down!

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: No. But that reminds me, (handing back a clipboard) sign this.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Oh it's nothing, it just says that you can't sue the city if you scrap your knee or y'know, get your head blown off.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (deadpan) Oh, hurry up. I want to sign that.

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Okay, here he comes. What is he doing? What the hell is he doing?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What? What? What? What is it?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Is everything okay?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What's going on?

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Okay, he sees us. Now don't move. Don't look at him.
They all turn and look away. Suddenly a loud bang sounds out and in slow motion Joey slowly throws his body over Ross. Gary is shocked at what he sees while Chandler is obviously hurt.

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Hey, it's okay. It was just a car backfire. (Joey slowly moves off of Ross.) Hey, look at that! You tried to save your buddy. You see that? You see what he did?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Ross) You okay man?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh-huh. Thank Joey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Uh, HELLO!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hi.
Commercial Break
Ross's apartment, Monica has all the supplies she needs and is getting ready to leave.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right, I guess we should go.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, wait. Wait.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh yeah right! (She grabs the money and shoves into her pocket.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, Monica! Monica! We have to fix this!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: There's nothing we can do. You erased the message!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah well unless we tell him.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, if you're gonna be totally rational about this, I can't argue with you! All right? Fine, if you wanna tell him, tell him. I just don't want to be a part of it.
The phone rings.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, maybe that's Emily calling back to leave the exact same message.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (on the machine) Hey Ross! It's you! I just want you to remember this feeling. You are lucky to be alive! So live everyday to the fullest. Love yourself, okay? Okay. Oh, and also get stamps. Bye! (He hangs up.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wow! Play that message for Emily and this whole problem goes away!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Right?
Central Perk, the guys are returning from the ride along to find Phoebe already there.

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Hey, anybody want to meet a hero?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (excited) John Glenn is here?!

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: No, Joey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Pheebs, we had the most incredible night! Okay, so, we're in the car...

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Wait! Hold on! (He goes over to Phoebe and gives her a kiss.) (To Phoebe) Hi!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: (To Ross) Okay, go ahead.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, okay, so we're in the car. Right? And bang! A shot was fired. And Joey with no regard for his own safety throws himself on me!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: My God, Joey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (pouting) It was a car backfire!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, but-but he didn't know that!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, I didn't know that.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And it could've just as easily have been a bullet.

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Hey Joe, you ever think about joining the force? We could use a guy like you.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Who jumps at loud noises!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wow! I could've died tonight.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah! If the car that backfired had run over you! Y'know what, I think I'll go home before Ross starts rambling about his newfound respect for life. (He gets up and starts for the door.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I do have a newfound respect for life.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (returning) Oh my God! (Storms out.)

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: (To Phoebe) So you wanna get some dinner?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah! Sure! Yep! (Gets up) Oh, y'know what? If I heard a shot right now, I'd throw my body on you.

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: Oh yeah? Well maybe you and I should take a walk through a bad neighborhood.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay!

lines.speaker: Gary
lines.text: All right.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Ross and Joey
lines.text: Bye!
They leave as Ross stares in awe at Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Cut it out Ross! I hate to have to save your life and kick your ass in the same day!
Chandler and Joey's, Chandler is pacing as Joey enters.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Dude! How come you took off?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, I just went for a walk, around the living room. Whatever...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Is something wrong?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No. No I'm just tired. Y'know, from-from the walk.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You dove in front of Ross! Ross!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's what this is about! Oh my God, you hate Ross!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I do not hate Ross!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Of course you do! I saved him! You're mad at me! It all adds up! You want Ross out of the picture.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What picture?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't know, but I don't like what I'm hearing!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look I'm very glad that you saved Ross from the car backfire, but y'know, it could've been a bullet and you y'know, you didn't try to save me!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ohh, you're upset because you think I chose Ross over you! No! I...knew...you could take care of yourself. Y'know, I mean Ross, he need help. He's not street like us!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: When it comes down to it, you would risk your life for Ross before you would for me. That's the bottom line.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, no, not exactly! All right, look, I, I wasn't trying to save Ross. Okay? My sandwich was next to Ross. All right? I was, I was trying to save my sandwich.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: From a bullet!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know it doesn't make much sense...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Much sense?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look Chandler, it was instinct! Okay? I just went for it!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So you risked your life, for a sandwich!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know it sounds crazy, but Chandler this is (Goes and picks up the sandwich) the greatest sandwich in the world!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So you didn't uh, choose Ross before me.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! I would never do that! You-you're like my brother!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Really?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! In fact, to prove how much you mean to me, (He unwraps the sandwich and holds it out for Chandler) here.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Thanks. (He grabs the sandwich.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, eh, oh-oi, easy, it's not a hot dog!
Chandler takes a bite.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: How good is that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (with his mouthful) Oh-oi-ho, yeah!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: See?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hm-hmm. (Goes to take another bite.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh-whoa-hey, dude, what are you doing?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I thought you were showing me how much you mean to me.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah. With a bite! (Takes back the sandwich.) Gee-e-e-eez!

Ross's apartment, Rachel is trying to repair the thing she broke earlier, but gets interrupted by hearing Ross at the door. She panics and throws the thing into the kitchen. And runs to the couch as Ross enters.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey! Hi!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Rach, what uh, what are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey! Y'know what? You are in our apartment all the time! Okay? This is, this is just a drop in the bucket mister!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y'know, it-it doesn't matter. The important thing is that you're here. You're my friend, and you're here. Oh! (He goes over and hugs her.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, just a little scared. What's going on Ross?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: The most amazing thing happened tonight. I thought my number was up. I had an actual near death experience!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?! What? What happened?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, okay, we were on the ride along with Gary, right?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And somebody took a shot at me!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (gasps) Really?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, a car backfired, but (Rachel suddenly calms down) I thought somebody was taking a shot at me. And Rach, I...I survived! And I was filled with this-this great respect for life. Y'know? I-I want to experience every moment. I want to seize every opportunity. I-I am seeing everything so-so clearly now.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Because a car backfired?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (stares at her briefly) Okay, why are you here?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, I-I-I don't know how this fits into your whole "seizing" thing but um, Emily called you today.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You talked to her?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, she left a message. (He starts for the machine.) (Stopping him.) But it-it kinda got erased. There's just (Pause) something wrong with your machine.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, okay, what-what did she say?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, uh something about having second thoughts about the wedding and did you guys make a mistake breaking up and uh, she wants you to call her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Now, that-that was a good thing that I told you, right?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Huh? Yeah! Yes, of course!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. Thank you! Thank you! Because-I'm sorry, all right. Because y'know what? She didn't want me-not important. The point is, I was right. Your decision. Okay? I was right. (She starts for the door.) (Stops) Your decision.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Right. I guess, I guess I should call Emily.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, no, that's not the right decision. That's not, that's not right, no Ross-Ross, come on! I mean, that woman made you miserable! Okay, Ross, do you really want to get back into that?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, look, yesterday I would've even considered calling her back, but my ex-wife calls on the same day I have a near death experience. I mean, that-that has got to mean something!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ugh, Ross! That was not a near death experience! That was barely an experience!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You weren't there! Okay, maybe this is something that I-I'm supposed to seize! Y'know?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, y'know what? Maybe, this is not about seizing stuff. Maybe this is about escaping stuff.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Huh.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I mean, look-look today you escaped (Pause) (Not believing it) death, y'know? And maybe this is a chance for you to escape getting back together with Emily?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That does make sense. Because I do wanna seize some opportunity, but I-I really don't wanna see or talk to her.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, there you go!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah. Maybe today is just, close call day.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (laughing) Close call day.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, thanks Rach. (They hug.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, honey no problem. Okay. (Gets up.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh wait-wait-wait! The message is blinking. Maybe you didn't erase it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh?
Ross hits the playback button.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (on machine) "Hey Ross, it's you!" (Hits the stop button) Oh yeah, no that's-that's an old message, nobody needs to hear that.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No. (She heads for the door again.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (looking at the coffee table where his money was) Hey umm, was-was Monica here?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, I want my money back.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (going out the door) Yeah, uh you-you probably need that for stamps, right?
Ross is stunned.
Ending Credits
Central Perk, everyone is there.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey Pheebs, has Gary ever been shot at for real?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yes. Once. Yeah, a little. He kinda did it to himself. It's not really a good story.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I wonder how I would react under fire, y'know? And not backfire but-but heavy fire, like I was in a war or something.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Man, I would be great in a war! I mean, I really, I think I would make a fantastic military leader. I mean I know I would make General way before any of you guys.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Before or after you were shot by your own troops?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I know where Joey would be. He would be down in the foxhole protecting all of us.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, if the foxhole was lined with sandwiches.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, hero sandwiches. (Points at Ross who points back.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well you all know that I'm a pacifist so I'm not interested in war in any way. (Gets up) But y'know what? When the revolution comes, I will have to destroy you all. (Starts to leave.) (To Joey) Not you Joey.
Joey gets all happy with himself, while the rest of the gang is less than enthused.
End
